creator: vd@FreeBSD.org
text:
> I'm the new upstream for all OSSP software

Hello, thanks for you effort in trying to take care about the OSSP pieces.

Do any of the current maintainers have access to the new web sites? Or are they even aware of this takeover? Did you contact Ralf S. Engelschall?

Usually a new contributor gains the trust of existent maintainer(s) before he is given access to the existent infrastructure (source code repository, web page, ftp, etc), instead of replacing it. Maybe you can ask Ralf for access to ossp.org?

We don't want to end up in another xz situation (https://tukaani.org/xz-backdoor/).
